mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.name, h.level, h.address, h.phone, h.intro, h.image, h.province, h.city, h.department_count, h.doctor_count, h.follow_count, h.status FROM t_follow f INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON f.follow_id = h.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.follow_type = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
